title: Census periodic task waits 7 days before first run
description: File: src/cli.rs:cmd_serve. The periodic census registration spawns a task that sleeps 7 days before the first ping, then repeats every 7 days. If the server is restarted frequently (e.g., during deploys), the census ping never fires. Consider doing the first ping on startup (or after a short delay like 60 seconds), then every 7 days thereafter.
